name: TableOfContents
description: Renders a list of headings on the page and tracks current heading visible in the viewport
searchText: tableofcontents renders a list of headings on the page and tracks current heading visible in the viewport @mantine/core /core/table-of-contents autocontrast color depthoffset getcontrolprops initialdata mindepthtooffset radius reinitializeref scrollspyoptions size

props.name: autoContrast
props.description: If set, adjusts text color based on background color for filled variant

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color value

props.name: depthOffset
props.description: Controls padding on the left side of control, multiplied by (depth - minDepthToOffset), 20px by default

props.name: getControlProps
props.description: A function to pass props down to controls, accepts values from use-scroll-spy hook as an argument and active state.

props.name: initialData
props.description: Data used to render content until actual values are retrieved from the DOM

props.name: minDepthToOffset
props.description: Minimum depth value that requires offset, 1 by default

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius

props.name: reinitializeRef
props.description: A function to reinitialize headings from use-scroll-spy hook

props.name: size
props.description: Controls font-size and padding of all elements
